# Curated Lecture Media Images

Draft: reviewed rows are reliable; unreviewed rows are candidates.

| Image | 설명 | 맥락 | 검토 |
|---|---|---|---|
| <img src="assets/2d078e95e55a-74cfe1ca89b1-img-001.png" width="180"> | 어텐션 헤드가 입력 차원 0-3을 출력 차원 8-11로 복사하도록 W_V와 W_out 행렬을 채우는 연습 도식. | Transformer Circuit Exercises Exercise 1(a): head 1 copies dimensions 0-3 of its input to 8-11 in its output. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5407cdec2b8a-5f19041afece-img-002.png" width="180"> | 두 번째 어텐션 헤드가 이전 헤드가 쓴 차원과 손대지 않은 차원을 함께 읽어 토큰 정보를 복사하는 행렬 예시. | Transformer Circuit Exercises Exercise 1(b): W_V^2 has one 1 in a column corresponding to W_O^1 and three 1s in untouched columns. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ad55328e190b-cf858f2f344e-img-003.png" width="180"> | W_out과 W_V를 곱한 W_net 행렬이 어텐션 헤드의 정보 이동 연산을 어떻게 요약하는지 보여주는 풀이 도식. | Transformer Circuit Exercises Exercise 1(c): expand W_net^1 and W_net^2; the matrices describe the full operation of an attention head moving residual-stream information. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1d8f3f34c56a-cf0958f4f679-img-004.png" width="180"> | 두 토큰 복사와 한 토큰 복사를 W_net 합성식으로 비교해 virtual attention head 구성을 연습하는 도식. | Transformer Circuit Exercises Exercise 1(d): compare two-token copy W_net^2 W_net^1 with one-token copy W_net^2 Id plus Id W_net^1. | yes |
| <img src="assets/dd7339b3a89f-8ff677d45bf4-img-001.png" width="180"> | Transformer 블록이 residual stream을 읽고 attention/MLP 결과를 다시 더해 쓰는 전체 아키텍처 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits High-Level Architecture: token embedding, residual blocks, attention layer, MLP layer, and token unembedding. | yes |
| <img src="assets/91e65265f759-bbaf933bd694-img-002.png" width="180"> | residual stream이 각 layer의 결과가 더해지는 선형 통신 채널로 작동한다는 개념을 설명하는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: each layer adds results into the residual stream, which acts as a communication channel. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0ea2cf81da7b-d7f9e871877c-img-003.png" width="180"> | 선형 residual stream 때문에 멀리 떨어진 layer 사이에도 implicit virtual weight를 곱으로 볼 수 있음을 보여주는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: virtual weights directly connect pairs of layers by multiplying their interactions through the residual stream. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c4e64855595f-42df3781fef2-img-004.png" width="180"> | residual stream bandwidth 압박 속에서 일부 head/MLP가 다른 layer가 쓴 차원을 지우는 memory management 역할을 할 수 있음을 보여주는 그림. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: some MLP neurons and attention heads may clear residual-stream dimensions written by other layers. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9f308943cc6d-fb1aef7007a7-img-005.png" width="180"> | attention head가 한 토큰의 residual stream에서 정보를 읽고 다른 토큰의 residual stream에 쓰는 기본 동작을 설명하는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: attention heads move information by reading from one token and writing to another token. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b081738f2bcd-78b6f199f89a-img-006.png" width="180"> | 1-layer attention-only transformer를 token embedding, attention layer, unembedding의 곱 구조로 나타낸 기본 아키텍처 그림. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: a one-layer attention-only transformer consists of token embedding, attention layer, and unembedding. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fd903d005b7f-31534b5d0d63-img-007.png" width="180"> | attention head 표현을 tensor notation으로 바꿔 transformer 계산을 세 항의 곱으로 쓰는 과정을 보여주는 수식 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: represent the transformer as a product of three terms using tensor notation and the movement view of attention heads. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d6f5b424b547-1bf81a20fb48-img-008.png" width="180"> | layer별 곱을 전개해 각 항을 end-to-end path로 해석하는 path expansion 핵심 아이디어를 보여주는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: expanding the product turns layer terms into a sum where each term corresponds to an end-to-end path. | yes |
| <img src="assets/06b27d5a4e39-604c169f16c0-img-009.png" width="180"> | QK 회로와 OV 회로를 토큰에서 어텐션 헤드와 logits까지 이어지는 계산 경로로 나눠 보여주는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: QK circuit traces query/key vectors to an attention head; OV circuit traces value vectors through to logits. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4d1490750d1a-0f2b0b5055da-img-010.png" width="180"> | 1-layer 모델의 attention head가 source-destination-out 토큰 조합에서 복사 행동을 강하게 보이는 예시 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits Copying / Primitive In-Context Learning: OV and QK entries reveal skip-trigram copying examples. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4173bd71b824-12ba7888bf9c-img-011.png" width="180"> | 공백 없이 쪼개진 단어 토큰에서 copying head가 skip-trigram을 만들어내는 tokenizer 관련 예시 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: copying skip-trigrams appear for words split into two tokens when no leading space is present. | yes |
| <img src="assets/57995b1ede4d-7155ffb81fcd-img-012.png" width="180"> | 1-layer copying head에서 관찰되는 primitive in-context learning 패턴들을 추상화해 정리한 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: copying behavior is summarized into abstract patterns that act like primitive in-context learning. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d667c639f93e-3cd90c1549cc-img-013.png" width="180"> | 1-layer 모델의 positional attention head가 현재 토큰 또는 이전 토큰을 강하게 선호하는 attention pattern 예시. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: some one-layer attention heads are primarily positional, preferring the present token or previous token. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4fcbd9a3b8eb-edd69357facb-img-014.png" width="180"> | one-layer 모델이 skip-trigram을 OV와 QK의 factored form으로만 표현해 3-way interaction에 한계가 있음을 보여주는 예시 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: one-layer models represent skip-trigrams in a factored form split between OV and QK matrices. | yes |
| <img src="assets/cd6723ed9160-4ddc7113295d-img-015.png" width="180"> | copying matrix의 고유값 분해를 통해 attention head가 copying 성향을 갖는지 보는 분석 그래프. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: eigendecomposition expresses the matrix as eigenvectors and eigenvalues for detecting copying. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7361d9406536-6f35ffee3057-img-016.png" width="180"> | 고유값 기반 요약 통계로 12개 head 중 상당수가 copying head인지 집계한 히스토그램. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: a histogram summarizes how many attention heads are copying, suggesting 10 of 12 are significant. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e8cf2b1d8fcd-abc3f0f74ea9-img-017.png" width="180"> | 2-layer attention-only transformer에서 logits 계산을 layer 곱의 path expansion으로 분해하는 수식 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: ask how logits are computed by expanding a product where every term is a layer into a sum of paths. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1da9a4f21a39-f3078c9c9711-img-018.png" width="180"> | 두 attention layer가 만드는 multilinear 함수를 6차원 tensor와 tensor product로 표현해야 하는 이유를 보여주는 수식 그림. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: expressing the two-layer function requires a six-dimensional tensor using tensor products on matrices. | yes |
| <img src="assets/68794f05d903-2c222a72d7b6-img-020.png" width="180"> | Harry Potter 문단에서 induction head 1:8의 attention pattern과 다음 토큰 logit 기여를 함께 보여주는 예시. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: examples where induction heads help predict tokens in the first paragraph of Harry Potter. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b2b87bf7b072-1a11f50a2f7e-img-021.png" width="180"> | 더 큰 모델의 induction head에서 key/query intensity를 토큰 기준으로 펼쳐 prefix matching을 설명하는 예시. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: QK circuits can be expanded in terms of tokens; key and query intensity show matching amount. | yes |
| <img src="assets/33b312f63fcf-2664e8b5712b-img-022.png" width="180"> | QK와 OV 행렬의 copying/matching 성향을 고유값 trace 같은 요약 통계로 비교하는 분석 그래프. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: eigenvalue summary statistics are used as a working formalization for detecting copying or matching matrices. | yes |
| <img src="assets/02726be6d61a-875422069831-img-023.png" width="180"> | 2차 virtual attention head 항이 해당 모델에서 marginal effect가 작다는 V-composition 결과를 보여주는 비교 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: second-order virtual attention head terms have a small marginal effect in this model. | yes |
| <img src="assets/562bbf058985-e2db26f2e0c2-img-024.png" width="180"> | individual attention head term을 layer 1과 layer 2로 나누어 어느 layer head에 집중할지 보여주는 분해 표. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: individual attention head terms are subdivided into layer 1 and layer 2, suggesting focus on second-layer heads. | yes |
| <img src="assets/393adb8cc59e-7e2d545b9d6f-img-025.png" width="180"> | K-composition 계산에서 Frobenius norm 항을 어떤 순서로 곱해 근사했는지 설명하는 수식/계산 절차 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: K-composition norms were computed with reordered matrix products for efficiency. | yes |
| <img src="assets/22d0a36f3c07-249c868fd643-img-027.png" width="180"> | MLP layer가 residual stream을 읽어 activation을 계산하고 다시 residual stream에 투영해 더하는 구조를 설명하는 도식. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: an MLP computes activations from the residual stream, projects them back down, and adds them to the residual stream. | yes |
| <img src="assets/746515a5195f-21e015f08b4a-img-028.png" width="180"> | MLP weights를 뉴런 간 연결 가중치처럼 시각화해 transformer MLP 해석을 CNN circuit 분석과 비교하는 예시. | A Mathematical Framework for Transformer Circuits: visualizing weights between neurons can help reverse engineer neural networks, analogous to CNN circuit work. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b78b4188e0c6-7e42b2dc8e9d-img-001.png" width="180"> | 반복 랜덤 시퀀스에서 [A][B]...[A]가 주어질 때 [B] 가능성을 높이는 induction head 동작을 설명하는 도식. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Key Concepts: induction heads increase likelihood of B given A B ... A on repeated random sequences. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d94127695d08-e8fd4ab7e01d-img-002.png" width="180"> | 여러 모델 snapshot의 per-token loss vector를 모아 PCA로 학습 중 기능 변화를 분석하는 절차 도식. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Per-Token Loss Analysis: collect log-likelihoods from model snapshots, combine them into per-token loss vectors, and apply PCA. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ace83039f46c-79aa4d17623b-img-003.png" width="180"> | 학습 초반 25-50억 토큰 구간에서 in-context learning이 급격히 형성되는 phase change 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: in-context learning develops abruptly during a narrow early training window, then remains roughly constant. | yes |
| <img src="assets/050801767b84-a94630ad4500-img-004.png" width="180"> | 토큰 위치별 loss 감소율을 학습 진행 축으로 그려 phase change 뒤 긴 context에서 loss 개선이 이어짐을 보여주는 heatmap. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: derivative of loss with respect to log token index shows loss continues improving past token 50 after the phase change. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2df3880c9a88-3744bec14ade-img-005.png" width="180"> | in-context learning이 급증하는 같은 학습 구간에 induction head 점수도 함께 형성되는 co-occurrence 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: induction heads form abruptly during the same window where in-context learning develops. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8931b5f23a9c-c6dc5aec83ad-img-006.png" width="180"> | phase change가 평균 training loss 곡선에도 작은 bump로 드러나며 1-layer 모델과 다른 궤적을 만든다는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: the phase-change window is visible as a bump in the loss curve and marks divergence from a one-layer model. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a640e40705b9-b4f2e32533d5-img-007.png" width="180"> | per-token loss PCA 공간에서 모델 학습 궤적이 phase change 구간에 방향을 바꾸는 모습을 보여주는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: PCA trajectories of model predictions pivot during the same window where in-context learning abruptly improves. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ce29e2e1f027-0b648a59dd54-img-008.png" width="180"> | Harry Potter 문단에서 phase change 전후 반복 시퀀스 예측은 좋아지고 충돌되는 다음 토큰 예측은 나빠지는 token-level 예시. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: before/after phase-change log-likelihood differences on the first Harry Potter paragraph show repeated sequences improve and conflicting co | yes |
| <img src="assets/178d13600864-23b5a60db3ee-img-009.png" width="180"> | Harry Potter 예시에서 phase change 동안 반복 토큰 예측은 좋아지고 충돌 토큰 예측은 나빠지는 per-token loss 궤적. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: per-token loss trajectories for two Harry Potter tokens, one improving and one worsening during phase change. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fed06b817d9b-124366fb0c8b-img-010.png" width="180"> | smeared-key 아키텍처가 1-layer에서도 in-context learning을 만들고 더 깊은 모델에서는 더 이르게 만들 수 있음을 보여주는 결과 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Argument 2: smeared-key models form in-context learning in one-layer models and earlier in deeper models. | yes |
| <img src="assets/00bb77c763a9-fcf1ed0d477b-img-011.png" width="180"> | induction head를 test-time에 ablate하면 small model의 in-context learning이 크게 줄어드는 직접 개입 결과. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Argument 3: knocking out induction heads at test time greatly decreases in-context learning in small models. | yes |
| <img src="assets/71cf05c5130d-bf8166023fc4-img-012.png" width="180"> | 이전 head가 key 정보를 한 토큰 shift하고 induction head가 현재 토큰과 매칭하는 K-composition 메커니즘 도식. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Summary: prefix matching is implemented with K-composition in the QK circuit, shifting key information from a previous head. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e66c29aa9509-a2c974089564-img-013.png" width="180"> | in-context learning score를 50/500 토큰이 아닌 다른 token index 기준으로 정의해도 모델 간 차이가 작음을 보여주는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Curiosities: varying the index used to define in-context learning still shows similar amounts across models after phase change. | yes |
| <img src="assets/796104acdc62-bddbbe733af1-img-014.png" width="180"> | 큰 모델의 성능 이점이 context 초반 몇 토큰에서 대부분 형성되고 이후에는 비슷한 폭으로 loss가 줄어드는 현상을 보여주는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: large models gain most of their advantage over small models in the first ten tokens of context. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ee926d1d7af9-f817752de20c-img-015.png" width="180"> | phase change 전후로 모델 크기별 loss derivative 순서가 뒤집히는 학습 동역학 관찰을 보여주는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Phase Change Effect on Loss Derivatives: the derivative order of loss curves switches at phase change. | yes |
| <img src="assets/3d3dec4cbc0e-ecec61fb628c-img-016.png" width="180"> | 1-layer transformer가 더 깊은 모델과 다른 scaling-law 경향을 보이는 현상을 induction head 부재와 연결해 설명하는 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Additional Curiosities: 1-layer transformers differ from deeper transformers and may break scaling-law patterns because they lack induction  | yes |
| <img src="assets/5098452c3082-9acc0c77966c-img-017.png" width="180"> | attention-only 모델에서 induction head가 모델 깊이의 마지막 layer 쪽에 형성되는 위치 분포를 보여주는 산점도. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: each point is a head, colored by layer, with y-axis as prefix matching score. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6144cf10f11b-4e717a3f0f79-img-018.png" width="180"> | MLP가 있는 small model에서는 5L/6L부터 induction head가 마지막 layer보다 second-to-last layer에 더 많이 생김을 보여주는 위치 산점도. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Where induction heads form: in small models with MLPs, 5L and 6L induction heads form more in the second-to-last layer. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ccc868f438d7-56c079bbca28-img-019.png" width="180"> | full-scale 모델에서는 induction head 다수가 모델 깊이의 절반 이전에도 형성됨을 보여주는 위치 산점도. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads: in 24L and 40L full-scale models, the majority of induction heads form before the halfway point in depth. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f2f7544f7b48-f6d7b8787872-img-020.png" width="180"> | head activation evaluator에서 prefix matching 점수가 양수인 head일수록 copying score도 양수일 가능성이 높다는 분포 그래프. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Distribution of scores: heads with positive prefix matching score are more likely to have positive copying score. | yes |
| <img src="assets/53c6ee243ef1-d07b598356bc-img-021.png" width="180"> | copying evaluator가 OV matrix의 고유값 기반 측정치와 잘 상관된다는 검증 산점도. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Validating head activation evaluators: copying evaluator correlates with the OV matrix eigenvalue measure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b15bc962cf9d-70b51dc4b458-img-022.png" width="180"> | prefix matching evaluator가 previous-token QK circuit의 eigenvalue trace와 잘 상관됨을 보여주는 검증 산점도. | In-context Learning and Induction Heads Validating head activation evaluators: prefix matching evaluator correlates with the trace of QK eigenvalues for the previous-token term. | yes |
| <img src="assets/44d1b210b397-efb4ab084cc4-img-001.png" width="180"> | 비특권 basis와 privileged basis를 대비해 MLP activation의 basis가 왜 해석 가능성에 중요한지 설명하는 도식. | Softmax Linear Units 3.2: non-privileged representations can rotate freely, while coordinate-wise nonlinearities create a privileged basis. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e7bed55b0803-34e308cdef41-img-002.png" width="180"> | Polysemanticity와 superposition hypothesis를 나란히 놓고 feature가 neuron basis에 정렬되지 않는 이유를 설명하는 도식. | Softmax Linear Units 3.3 / superposition context: most features may not align with neurons when models embed more features than neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/47d4ef45659f-0000ff6daf09-img-003.png" width="180"> | 작은 신경망이 sparse larger model을 근사적으로 시뮬레이션할 수 있지만 feature interference가 생기는 superposition 직관 도식. | Softmax Linear Units 3.3: a small neural network may simulate a sparse larger model at the cost of interference. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a832ba38a586-c5aabb1a1e54-img-004.png" width="180"> | SoLU가 distributed vector를 작게 만들더라도 뒤의 LayerNorm이 다시 키워 superposition을 일부 통과시킬 수 있음을 설명하는 도식. | Softmax Linear Units 4.3: LayerNorm is invariant to scaling, so vectors suppressed by SoLU can be rescaled larger afterward. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5f232dc29e78-6eb1271d74dd-img-005.png" width="180"> | SoLU 모델과 baseline 모델의 loss 및 model-size-equivalent 성능 차이를 모델 크기별로 비교한 학습 곡선. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 1: loss curves for baseline and SoLU models from 10M to 50B parameters, plus model-size-equivalent performance. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d77d1cc6de12-e86bf1271553-img-006.png" width="180"> | Lambada, ARC, TriviaQA 등 downstream task에서 SoLU와 baseline 모델 성능을 모델 크기별로 비교한 평가 그래프. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 2: downstream task performance for baseline vs SoLU on Lambada, OpenBookQA, ARC, HellaSwag, MMLU, TriviaQA, and arithmetic. | yes |
| <img src="assets/da1fac204f1e-951977c4521b-img-007.png" width="180"> | 뉴런이 강하게 firing한 dataset snippet을 빨간 하이라이트로 보여주고 사람이 빠르게 해석 가능성을 판단하는 평가 예시. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 3: evaluators inspect text snippets where a neuron fires heavily, highlighted by activation magnitude. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8223ff6acddd-8309a7bf9f50-img-008.png" width="180"> | SoLU 모델 뉴런이 baseline보다 더 자주 preliminary interpretable로 판정되는 비율을 모델 크기별로 비교한 그래프. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 4: SoLU increases the fraction of preliminarily interpretable neurons versus baseline for 1L to 40L models. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c9948eb45388-e95f490b6449-img-009.png" width="180"> | 1-layer SoLU 모델에서 base64 텍스트에 반응하는 뉴런과 그 뉴런이 올리는 출력 토큰 logits를 함께 보여주는 예시. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 5: a 1-layer SoLU neuron fires on base64 text and increases mixed-case string tokens while decreasing English words. | yes |
| <img src="assets/87452041c11a-81c4eb66b03e-img-010.png" width="180"> | 같은 토큰 die가 독일어, 네덜란드어, 아프리칸스어 문맥에서 다르게 표현되는 early-layer 언어별 뉴런 예시. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 6: three early-layer neurons fire for the word die in specific non-English language contexts and not in English. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7878e073ec48-8f6a0667325b-img-011.png" width="180"> | late-layer 뉴런이 내부 단어 표현을 다시 literal output token으로 변환하는 re-tokenization 예시. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 7: late-layer neurons fire on one token while increasing the likelihood of a specific next token, decoding words into output tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4614c7b659af-cedc543ceed2-img-012.png" width="180"> | 숫자가 사람 수를 셀 때만 반응하는 middle-layer 뉴런으로, SoLU 모델의 더 추상적인 feature 예시를 보여준다. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 8: a middle-layer neuron fires on numbers only when the number enumerates people. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1cb0a4a3d082-b01a0381cb65-img-013.png" width="180"> | LayerNorm 이후 낮은 activation 영역에서 주 hypothesis와 맞지 않는 사례가 늘어나는 interpretability illusion/feature smuggling 진단 그래프. | Softmax Linear Units Figure 9: post-LayerNorm examples are more likely to be inconsistent with the primary neuron hypothesis in the low-activation regime. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7a814465da66-5d04178c0535-img-001.png" width="180"> | 중요도가 다른 다섯 feature를 2차원에 저장할 때 sparsity 변화에 따라 superposition이 생기는 toy model 개요도. | Toy Models of Superposition: train an embedding of five features with varying importance in two dimensions while changing sparsity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d94678581784-bd3f350a15b6-img-002.png" width="180"> | activation function이 대칭을 깨면서 feature가 특정 basis 축에 정렬되는 privileged basis 직관 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: activation functions break rotational symmetry and encourage features to align with basis directions. | yes |
| <img src="assets/62c6d689001a-ed78ce54cd83-img-004.png" width="180"> | 여러 feature를 거의 직교한 방향으로 겹쳐 저장하고 interference를 감수하는 superposition 가설 도식. | Toy Models of Superposition: features can be represented as almost-orthogonal directions in activation space, introducing interference. | yes |
| <img src="assets/584dbae27438-dac61e4fee50-img-005.png" width="180"> | 작은 신경망이 sparse larger model을 noisy하게 모사할 수 있다는 superposition 핵심 직관 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: a small neural network may simulate a larger sparse model with some noisy interference. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ba256c9bb221-093ab576efd5-img-006.png" width="180"> | 고차원 입력 x를 작은 hidden representation h로 압축한 뒤 다시 복원하는 toy autoencoder 설정 도식. | Toy Models of Superposition: project high-dimensional inputs into fewer hidden dimensions and recover them with weighted reconstruction loss. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1604533b58b3-02d2444dc723-img-007.png" width="180"> | W^T W와 bias를 시각화해 feature 중요도와 feature 간 간섭을 한눈에 보게 한 기본 분석 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: visualize W^T W and b with features arranged from most to least important. | yes |
| <img src="assets/282e2df47ec9-a923fda9ff28-img-008.png" width="180"> | 소수 feature toy model에서 sparsity 조건별로 feature interaction과 bias가 어떻게 달라지는지 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: small-feature experiments visualize the learned feature interaction matrix and bias across settings. | yes |
| <img src="assets/797bd9c55788-3008a8c4a624-img-009.png" width="180"> | linear model과 ReLU model이 같은 feature 저장 문제에서 다른 superposition 패턴을 만드는 비교 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: compare linear and ReLU models on few-feature cases to show the impact of nonlinear output. | yes |
| <img src="assets/139e6d2c07b4-901d4648b6a4-img-010.png" width="180"> | m=20, n=80 규모에서도 작은 예시와 유사한 feature superposition 구조가 나타남을 보여주는 확장 실험 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: with 20 hidden dimensions and 80 features, the model shows qualitatively similar superposition structure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/220f2df41a95-ea52e627484a-img-011.png" width="180"> | linear neural network의 학습 동역학을 설명하는 Saxe et al. 스타일 곡선으로, feature가 순차적으로 학습되는 직관을 준다. | Toy Models of Superposition: references Saxe et al. learning dynamics of linear neural networks for understanding feature learning. | yes |
| <img src="assets/52441c903de4-5872ac30685e-img-012.png" width="180"> | 희소 입력의 가능한 sparsity pattern별로 loss 적분을 나누는 수식 전개 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: decompose the expected loss over sparsity patterns using a binomial expansion. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b9a1d71bf4d3-ad323e5812f1-img-013.png" width="180"> | 2개 feature를 1개 차원에 저장하는 세 가지 폐형식 해를 비교해 superposition 전략을 설명하는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: closed-form toy model solutions show three ways to store two features in one dimension. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c645b95e5c28-740a3698a988-img-014.png" width="180"> | 4개 feature를 낮은 차원에 넣을 때 어떤 feature 방향을 포기하는지에 따라 생기는 자연스러운 해들을 비교한 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: a theoretical model yields four natural solutions depending on which feature direction W ignores. | yes |
| <img src="assets/88a0e5924e89-90c32c331433-img-015.png" width="180"> | dimensions per feature 지표 D*가 1과 1/2 같은 특정 값에 머무는 phase-change 패턴을 보여주는 그래프. | Toy Models of Superposition: D* = m / ||W||_F^2 reveals dimensions-per-feature values sticking at 1 and 1/2. | yes |
| <img src="assets/91da87bdee0d-52b4ecba4491-img-016.png" width="180"> | feature dimensionality가 특정 분수 값에 군집하며 모델이 선호하는 weight geometry가 있음을 보여주는 산점/히트맵. | Toy Models of Superposition: learned points cluster at specific fractional dimensionalities, suggesting preferred weight geometries. | yes |
| <img src="assets/94552f621758-25b920c28806-img-017.png" width="180"> | Thomson problem의 균일 polytope 해를 조합해 superposition geometry를 설명하는 도형 모음. | Toy Models of Superposition: Thomson solutions can be expressed as tegum products of smaller uniform polytopes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fd15df83f6c4-6762d7fcba9b-img-018.png" width="180"> | 정다면체 구조와 superposition 저장 전략이 어떻게 대응되는지 보여주는 geometry 설명 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: exact correspondence between polytopes and strategies for storing features in superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/71eb1ce9e1c1-6d855b5608fd-img-019.png" width="180"> | 회전 정렬로 canonicalize한 뒤 non-uniform superposition이 균일 polytope에서 어떻게 변형되는지 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: canonicalize solutions by rotation to compare non-uniform superposition as deformed uniform structures. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8bc6524adb06-efac292a2a46-img-020.png" width="180"> | 상관/반상관 feature가 있을 때 m=2 toy model의 weight geometry가 어떻게 달라지는지 비교한 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: train small models with correlated and anti-correlated features and visualize the m=2 weights. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6e29c7ff8764-c0f69e1ab46b-img-021.png" width="180"> | 두 correlated feature 집합이 있는 큰 모델에서 W^T W 블록 구조와 local non-superposition을 보여주는 heatmap. | Toy Models of Superposition: a larger model with two correlated feature sets shows block structure in W^T W and local non-superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e68b8befc227-7f13d45b3a57-img-022.png" width="180"> | sparsity를 낮추면 hexagon 형태의 sparse-regime superposition이 feature collapse로 전환되는 과정을 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: varying sparsity moves from a hexagonal sparse-regime geometry toward collapsed feature representations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/61258b16e5fc-dcb5a5eb5430-img-023.png" width="180"> | 학습 중 feature dimensionality가 특정 energy level 사이를 점프하듯 이동하는 trajectory 그래프. | Toy Models of Superposition: feature dimensionalities over training reveal discrete jumps and colored trajectories. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fcc15430d004-f21e76e2ef3a-img-024.png" width="180"> | n=6, m=3 조건에서 correlated feature를 표현할 때 나타나는 feature geometry를 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: correlated features can be represented as six features in three dimensions with structured geometry. | yes |
| <img src="assets/23a5bf39c0c7-e0d9624d6431-img-025.png" width="180"> | superposition이 형성될수록 adversarial vulnerability가 급격히 커지는 관계를 보여주는 그래프. | Toy Models of Superposition: adversarial vulnerability sharply increases as features move into superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/32c8c762dc40-fba983ee2145-img-026.png" width="180"> | linear hidden layer와 ReLU hidden layer toy model의 weight 구조를 비교해 privileged basis 효과를 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: compare learned weights from a linear hidden layer model and a ReLU hidden layer model. | yes |
| <img src="assets/03aef07bee13-496ed44df038-img-027.png" width="180"> | 뉴런별 weight를 쌓아 보여주는 stack plot으로 polysemantic neuron이 여러 색 조각으로 보인다는 점을 설명하는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: a per-neuron stacked bar plot makes polysemantic neurons visible as columns with multiple feature weights. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4c5b449ec1e5-e18b8a6bc26a-img-028.png" width="180"> | sparsity가 높아질수록 monosemantic neuron과 polysemantic neuron이 함께 나타나는 ReLU hidden layer 결과 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: raw W and neuron stack plots show a shift from monosemantic to polysemantic neurons as sparsity increases. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6e521d1ff05e-990ab7a4e491-img-029.png" width="180"> | 입출력층은 disentangled model로 두고 더 작은 hidden layer가 superposition으로 계산하는 설정을 보여주는 도식. | Toy Models of Superposition: input and output layers are imagined disentangled while a smaller hidden layer may compute in superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/94eee9663da7-d587a5b0411f-img-030.png" width="180"> | absolute value 계산 모델의 weight를 W, stack plot, graph 세 방식으로 해석할 수 있음을 보여주는 시각화 방법 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: weights for the absolute value computation model can be visualized directly, as stacks, or as a graph. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4751c059b068-71cd016ca2f5-img-031.png" width="180"> | absolute value를 계산하기 위해 각 feature의 positive side와 negative side 뉴런을 만드는 기본 해를 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: the learned model computes absolute value by creating positive-side and negative-side ReLU neurons for each feature. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4dd7636412b5-15fc32ab4f1d-img-032.png" width="180"> | absolute value toy model에서 sparsity 변화에 따라 feature가 단일 뉴런에서 polysemantic 뉴런으로 이동하는 stack plot. | Toy Models of Superposition: with n=100 and m=40, stacked weight plots show superposition emerging as features become sparse. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8b6e2ac03593-678cdfeeb66d-img-033.png" width="180"> | 중간 sparsity 구간에서 일부 뉴런만 강하게 polysemantic해지는 현상을 실제 대형 모델 행동과 연결하는 예시 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: intermediate sparsity regimes show qualitative behaviors reminiscent of full-scale neural networks. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d75c2ab8b298-b475ed77b44a-img-034.png" width="180"> | absolute value 모델에서 대부분은 해석 가능하지만 일부 뉴런이 asymmetric superposition motif를 만든다는 분석 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: a model with limited superposition shows a few neurons doing something beyond the expected absolute-value computation. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ed1061d16b90-3a7317d37fac-img-035.png" width="180"> | asymmetric superposition과 inhibition이 두 뉴런 한 쌍으로 feature 간섭을 제어하는 메커니즘 도식. | Toy Models of Superposition: each asymmetric superposition and inhibition instance consists of two neurons with reciprocal weights. | yes |
| <img src="assets/31934655fc35-4d670936b09e-img-036.png" width="180"> | inhibition 뉴런이 positive interference를 negative interference로 바꿔 loss 영향을 줄이는 과정을 보여주는 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition: inhibition converts costly positive interference into less harmful negative interference under the output ReLU. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f2c45341e3fd-fe98eaf894b4-img-037.png" width="180"> | Redwood Research 후속 연구가 activation function과 constrained optimization 관점에서 superposition phase를 재해석한 비교 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition comments: Redwood&#x27;s related work studies a slightly different toy model and analyzes activation functions and constrained optimization. | yes |
| <img src="assets/cf1cf613e43b-fbef6a5047c6-img-038.png" width="180"> | DeepMind replication 코멘트에서 n=2, m=1 ReLU toy model의 loss surface와 minima를 직접 푼 결과 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition comments: a closed-form n=2, m=1 analysis plots full loss surfaces and solves for minima directly. | yes |
| <img src="assets/20c4b6f02a05-c856c75e03a2-img-039.png" width="180"> | feature 수가 representation 압력을 높일수록 fractional dimensionality 구조가 더 깨끗해지는 현상을 탐색한 코멘트 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition comments: more features competing for representation can create cleaner fractional dimensionality structure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/46be2927f559-9d476b0e74e5-img-040.png" width="180"> | 두 연속 값을 하나의 값으로 비선형 압축하는 예시가 linear compression보다 낮은 MSE를 낼 수 있음을 보여주는 부록 그림. | Toy Models of Superposition appendix: nonlinear compression can outperform simple linear compression for some epsilon and Z settings. | yes |
| <img src="assets/127ca1f1e906-bd89dcfcd405-img-001.png" width="180"> | orientation, scale, hue처럼 간단한 변수로 묶이는 feature family와 equivariance 직관을 보여주는 이미지 묶음. | Interpretability Dreams: feature families can be parameterized by simple variables like orientation, scale, or hue. | yes |
| <img src="assets/605d4efb6d31-af617892b8b4-img-002.png" width="180"> | feature뿐 아니라 이를 구현하는 circuit과 weight도 같은 변수 구조로 조직될 수 있음을 보여주는 도식. | Interpretability Dreams: circuits implementing feature families and weights between them can be organized by the same parameterization. | yes |
| <img src="assets/af47b9e68e78-2fff7a40b575-img-003.png" width="180"> | 단순 변환을 넘어 더 추상적인 variation으로도 neuron family가 형성될 수 있음을 보여주는 예시. | Interpretability Dreams: neuron families can be parameterized by more abstract types of variation beyond simple transformations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/752cf5722502-6dbb92a591ce-img-004.png" width="180"> | multimodal neuron 사례를 통해 사람, 감정 같은 추상 feature family가 언어 모델에도 가능함을 암시하는 그림. | Interpretability Dreams: multimodal neurons suggest more abstract neuron families, potentially analogous to features in language models. | yes |
| <img src="assets/47a88f668cc0-61f96d528d73-img-005.png" width="180"> | 명시적 branch가 없어도 neuron들이 여러 관계 축 위에 암묵적으로 조직될 수 있음을 보여주는 feature organization 지도. | Interpretability Dreams: branch-specialization experiments suggest neuron organization can be implicitly present even without architectural branches. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a831165313be-f1706159c856-img-006.png" width="180"> | 여러 vision model에서 반복적으로 나타나는 universal feature 예시를 모아 universality 개념을 설명하는 그림. | Interpretability Dreams: many visual features appear universal across models, making lessons from one model transferable. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f63692e69f60-334e4dca33a5-img-007.png" width="180"> | induction head 같은 미시적 circuit이 language model loss curve의 거시적 변화와 연결될 수 있음을 보여주는 그래프. | Interpretability Dreams: induction heads are microscopic phenomena with macroscopic effects, including visible bumps in loss curves. | yes |
| <img src="assets/554f75eca788-079f2c561b65-img-008.png" width="180"> | “모델이 절대 거짓말하지 않는다” 같은 안전성 명제를 worst-case claim 형태로 공식화한 도식. | Interpretability Dreams: safety goals may require claims like a model will never lie or manipulate, formalized as worst-case statements. | yes |
| <img src="assets/82ada59183c9-9967b4ed9a27-img-009.png" width="180"> | superposition과 scalability를 풀어야 전체 feature를 열거해 안전성 claim을 평가할 수 있다는 경로를 그린 도식. | Interpretability Dreams: evaluating strong safety claims may require solving both superposition and scalability to enumerate model behavior. | yes |
| <img src="assets/840c006bb9ec-37f574427f00-img-001.png" width="180"> | 이전 intermediate regime이 최적화 실패 artifact였고 memorizing/generalizing solution 사이 전이가 있음을 보여주는 train loss 그래프. | Circuits Updates - July 2023: better optimization shows the previous intermediate regime was an artifact, with a crossover between memorizing and generalizing solutions. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c53e1f4cc202-acf6db836b92-img-002.png" width="180"> | dataset size가 커질수록 memorizing solution이 개별 샘플 암기에서 correlated cluster 암기로 바뀌는 현상을 보여주는 그림. | Circuits Updates - July 2023: memorizing solutions gradually shift from individual data points to clusters of correlated data points near the transition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8d25b92bee66-43d43e752606-img-003.png" width="180"> | 언어 모델의 high-level action과 planning feature가 안전성 분석 대상이 될 수 있음을 설명하는 개념 도식. | Circuits Updates - July 2023: planning is listed as a safety-relevant hypothesized mechanism involving coordinated actions and future expectations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fb83c08438c7-9ebf1d5e53e8-img-002.png" width="180"> | dictionary size가 실제 factor 수와 맞을 때 rate-distortion Pareto frontier에서 “bounce”가 생기는 synthetic dictionary learning 결과. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: dictionary learning solutions bounce when the dictionary size matches the true number of factors. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9c1475482ff7-9f5362608bfa-img-003.png" width="180"> | feature pressure와 학습 시간이 superposition geometry의 fractional dimensionality 구조를 더 선명하게 만들 수 있음을 보여주는 heatmap. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: more competing features and longer training can create cleaner fractional dimensionality geometry. | yes |
| <img src="assets/833b0ab1625e-cf2722438559-img-004.png" width="180"> | 2차원 memorization 문제에서 data point가 서로 다른 반지름의 두 원으로 배열되는 “two circle” 현상을 보여주는 그림. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: in some m=2 memorization cases, data points arrange themselves on two circles of different radii. | yes |
| <img src="assets/caeebc6485ae-ed1e5c1d2fc6-img-005.png" width="180"> | feature superposition을 이상 feature X*가 관측 feature X로 map U를 통해 투영되는 구조로 표현한 기본 도식. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: feature superposition maps ideal features X* into observed features X through a matrix U. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f502a215a788-7f16b924cd22-img-006.png" width="180"> | 두 layer가 모두 superposition일 때 ideal weight도 tensor product map으로 superposition된다는 weight superposition 도식. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: ideal weights between superposed feature layers are mapped through a tensor-product-style weight superposition map. | yes |
| <img src="assets/62ca99f0137e-052185320b4e-img-007.png" width="180"> | OV-incoherent skip-trigram을 하나의 attention head가 처리하기 어려운 이유를 보여주는 attention head wiring diagram. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: OV-incoherent skip-trigrams motivate attention head superposition in one-layer toy transformers. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7431b08fdfb1-c42081001f95-img-008.png" width="180"> | 더 복잡한 skip-trigram 데이터에서 attention head superposition 배선이 읽기 어려워지지만 기하 구조가 남는다는 예시. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: wiring diagrams become complex with many skip-trigrams, but suggest underlying geometry in attention superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a5bcc1159a9b-31de636d8c97-img-009.png" width="180"> | 연속적인 feature manifold를 모델이 discrete feature처럼 쪼개 표현하는 emergent discretization 현상을 보여주는 그림. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: a feature manifold toy model studies how embeddings change with length scale and suggests emergent discretization. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8052cc6c8126-dc225a309509-img-010.png" width="180"> | Hobbhahn의 shifted superposition 사례로, ReLU를 피하려고 data point를 원점에서 이동시키는 toy model 현상을 보여주는 그림. | Circuits Updates - May 2023: shifted superposition can move data points away from zero to avoid ReLU behavior. | yes |
| <img src="assets/410470645eae-c886edd68547-img-001.png" width="180"> | 1-layer transformer의 MLP activation을 sparse autoencoder로 더 많은 feature 방향으로 분해하는 전체 문제 설정 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: the paper decomposes unavoidable MLP activations into features using a sparse autoencoder. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fe5e2e094f99-411a813f1ad3-img-002.png" width="180"> | 작은 신경망이 sparse한 큰 모델을 noisy하게 시뮬레이션한다는 superposition 가설을 다시 설명하는 직관 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: superposition motivates an overcomplete sparse feature decomposition with more features than neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f90f03760fc0-5d26ff9adf13-img-003.png" width="180"> | feature별 활성 예시, logit 효과, ablation 결과를 한 화면에서 살펴보는 feature exploration interface 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: the interface provides activation examples, logit effects, ablation effects, and related feature details. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d7f5cf1b0957-443009830084-img-004.png" width="180"> | feature를 검색하고 필터링해 특정 dictionary learning feature를 찾는 인터페이스 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: the feature interface includes search through all learned features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/90e065783f1d-e555f89e2b62-img-005.png" width="180"> | 하나의 dataset example에서 동시에 활성화되는 feature들을 보여주는 example-text 중심 인터페이스. | Towards Monosemanticity: a second interface shows all features active on a given dataset example. | yes |
| <img src="assets/214af1eb5c6d-ee524e9f0dd1-img-006.png" width="180"> | feature specificity 검증에서 polysemantic neuron이 여러 무관한 맥락에 반응하는 대비 사례를 보여주는 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: specificity matters because polysemantic neurons can activate for unrelated concepts across contexts. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fdd54e82db1f-2e659180a3a7-img-007.png" width="180"> | Arabic script feature의 activation이 Arabic proxy score와 함께 높은 구간에서 강하게 일치함을 보여주는 분포 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/3450 fires mostly on Arabic script, measured with a likelihood-ratio proxy over activation levels. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b2d40cfb990b-80023b28f765-img-008.png" width="180"> | Arabic script feature의 activation mass 대부분이 실제 Arabic script 예시에서 나온다는 expected value plot. | Towards Monosemanticity: activation-weighted analysis shows most activation magnitude comes from Arabic-script examples. | yes |
| <img src="assets/523f4cbf2a54-b83dba65a57f-img-009.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature가 켜질 때 Arabic 문자와 UTF-8 조각 token의 logit을 올리는 두 번째 mode를 보여주는 logit weight 분포. | Towards Monosemanticity: Arabic feature logit weights have a small positive mode corresponding to Arabic characters and byte tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8abbb5c4b72d-0cc60fa80880-img-010.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature를 ablate하면 Arabic token 예측이 약해지고 punctuation 일부는 반대로 변하는 causal ablation 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: ablating A/1/3450 hurts predictions of Arabic-script tokens across activation ranges. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1454890ae5f0-e6c38e4e6c57-img-011.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature 값을 높게 고정했을 때 모델 샘플이 Arabic script token 쪽으로 바뀌는 pinned sampling 결과. | Towards Monosemanticity: pinning the Arabic feature to a high value changes samples toward Arabic-script continuations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7bf1efc19727-4ff2b17c49d2-img-012.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature가 단일 neuron이 아니라 여러 neuron basis coefficient에 분산되어 있음을 보여주는 계수 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: Arabic feature coefficients in the neuron basis are spread across many neurons, not one aligned neuron. | yes |
| <img src="assets/51ec8ee98cc6-47093dad89af-img-013.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature와 가장 비슷한 neuron이 실제로는 여러 비영어 언어가 섞인 polysemantic 반응임을 보여주는 activation 분포. | Towards Monosemanticity: the most correlated neuron responds to mixed non-English languages with Arabic only a small sliver. | yes |
| <img src="assets/018b4e670cf3-7ac8628f1bd8-img-014.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature와 달리 가장 유사한 neuron의 logit weights가 Russian, Korean 등 여러 언어 token에 퍼져 있음을 보여주는 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: logit weights for the closest neuron are mixed across languages rather than Arabic-specific. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4d82dab53c8c-63e169aaceef-img-015.png" width="180"> | Arabic feature와 가장 비슷한 neuron의 activation/logit scatter가 약하게만 닮아 있어 feature가 neuron과 다름을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity: scatter plots show limited activation and logit similarity between the Arabic feature and the closest neuron. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1e792e09d79f-26ccdce8c1c4-img-016.png" width="180"> | 다른 random seed 모델 B에서도 Arabic script에 반응하는 유사 feature가 발견되는 universality 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: B/1/1334 is a highly correlated Arabic-script feature found in another model run. | yes |
| <img src="assets/edd9bd85e405-348f44a23a25-img-017.png" width="180"> | B-run Arabic feature도 Arabic character token을 올리는 별도 logit mode를 가진다는 검증 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: the B-run Arabic feature has similar Arabic-specific logit weight structure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d180b1d6901f-8445d4fdc949-img-018.png" width="180"> | A와 B의 Arabic feature가 activation과 logit weight에서 강하게 대응된다는 cross-model scatter 비교. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/3450 and B/1/1334 show strong activation correlation and comparable logit-weight structure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/49b7446a6130-118704de78e0-img-019.png" width="180"> | DNA sequence feature activation이 DNA proxy와 높은 상관을 보이는 activation specificity 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/2937 responds to long nucleotide strings and correlates with a DNA-sequence proxy. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a3fe50164dea-601d88a36579-img-020.png" width="180"> | DNA feature의 여러 activation level에서 proxy와 feature가 맞거나 어긋나는 실제 sequence 예시를 비교한 격자. | Towards Monosemanticity: examples across activation levels show DNA specificity and proxy misses caused by punctuation, spaces, or missing bases. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f0e8066be6a4-68b3f0f9c4a9-img-021.png" width="180"> | DNA feature가 켜질 때 AGT, GCC 같은 nucleotide 조합 token의 logit을 올린다는 downstream effect 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: DNA feature logit weights upweight nucleotide-combination tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/cc99b1128c3b-4edfb17e0f6d-img-022.png" width="180"> | DNA feature와 가장 비슷한 neuron에도 DNA 맥락은 작은 sliver뿐이라 feature가 단일 neuron이 아님을 보여주는 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: the closest neuron to the DNA feature has only a tiny sliver of DNA contexts. | yes |
| <img src="assets/56b696b02071-7596b40e5ceb-img-023.png" width="180"> | A/B 두 run의 DNA feature가 같은 nucleotide token logit mode를 공유한다는 universality 비교. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/2937 and B/1/3680 are correlated DNA features with matching top logit weights. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0c35d205db32-7beaaf9a7720-img-024.png" width="180"> | base64 feature가 base64 문자열 구간에서 주로 활성화되는 specificity와 activation level별 예시를 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/2357 is a base64 feature with activation distribution and examples specific to base64 strings. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6d6a08b63357-044026da47e2-img-025.png" width="180"> | base64 feature logit weights에서 base64-specific token이 오른쪽 mode로 분리되는 패턴을 보여주는 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: base64 feature logit weights have a second mode of base64-specific tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/037719df164d-1c4190d3c001-img-026.png" width="180"> | B-run에서도 유사한 base64 feature가 발견되어 activation specificity를 보이는 universality 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: B/1/2165 is a correlated base64 feature with high activation specificity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1928c70fd7ce-a92a2e4fd292-img-027.png" width="180"> | B-run base64 feature의 logit weights에도 base64 token mode가 나타나는 검증 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: the B-run base64 feature has a second logit-weight mode for base64 tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/59600bf45a0f-243ade7cab8c-img-028.png" width="180"> | A와 B의 base64 feature가 activation과 logit weight scatter에서 서로 대응됨을 보여주는 cross-run 비교. | Towards Monosemanticity: scatter plots show A/1/2357 and B/1/2165 are similar base64 features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0a22bd81d4a2-d313228c590d-img-029.png" width="180"> | base64 feature와 가장 비슷한 neuron은 base64뿐 아니라 code, HTML, URL에도 반응하는 혼합 feature임을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity: the most correlated neuron to the base64 feature also activates for code, HTML labels, URLs, and other contexts. | yes |
| <img src="assets/bf49de2959dc-f4a9867fca8d-img-030.png" width="180"> | base64 관련 neuron의 logit weights가 base64보다 filename ending 등 다른 token에 더 치우친다는 비교 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: the closest base64 neuron upweights some base64 tokens but is more focused on other tokens such as filename endings. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e79e36b7f9f9-e4ad26223159-img-031.png" width="180"> | base64 feature와 neuron의 activation/logit correlation이 낮아 neuron이 같은 feature를 일부만 담는다는 산점도. | Towards Monosemanticity: activation and logit correlations show the closest neuron partly represents the feature while doing other things. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b856f5b5fd3c-6bee0b110f2c-img-032.png" width="180"> | Hebrew feature가 높은 activation 구간에서 Hebrew Unicode script에 특이적으로 반응함을 보여주는 분포. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/416 is a Hebrew feature with high activation specificity in the upper spectrum. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e83958fa0142-401bed569c2e-img-033.png" width="180"> | Hebrew feature logit weights가 Hebrew character와 UTF-8 prefix token mode를 만든다는 downstream effect 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: Hebrew feature logit weights have a second mode for Hebrew characters and related byte tokens. | yes |
| <img src="assets/77e050409017-b37b1e33c14b-img-034.png" width="180"> | Hebrew feature와 가장 가까운 neuron의 activation/logit specificity가 낮다는 correlation 비교 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: no similar neuron appears for the Hebrew feature; the closest neuron has low activation and logit specificity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/51e108ab9175-b20eb133beee-img-035.png" width="180"> | B-run에서도 Hebrew script에 반응하는 유사 feature가 발견되는 universality activation 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: B/1/1901 is a correlated Hebrew feature with significant activation specificity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0d023822d47d-a4217cf5b7c9-img-036.png" width="180"> | B-run Hebrew feature의 logit weights에도 Hebrew token mode가 나타난다는 검증 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: the B-run Hebrew feature has the same kind of Hebrew-specific logit-weight mode. | yes |
| <img src="assets/113a2630ec12-181e61711348-img-037.png" width="180"> | A/B Hebrew feature의 activation과 logit weight가 서로 대응되는지 확인하는 cross-run scatter 비교. | Towards Monosemanticity: activation and logit-weight correlations are consistent between the A and B Hebrew features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a15604f6e542-dac4b890b0cd-img-038.png" width="180"> | 사람 평가자가 feature interval과 neuron을 해석가능성 rubric으로 채점했을 때 feature가 더 높게 나온 결과 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: blinded human scoring finds learned features substantially more interpretable than neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8e55ec7df586-41d3a2365022-img-039.png" width="180"> | Claude 기반 automated interpretability가 feature activation을 neuron보다 더 잘 설명하고 예측한다는 상관 분포. | Towards Monosemanticity: automated activation explanations predict feature activations better than neuron activations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ed544b201414-131dc0fc1b28-img-040.png" width="180"> | feature 설명으로 unseen logit token 예측을 시켰을 때 feature가 neuron보다 높은 정확도를 보이는 자동 평가 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: automated logit-weight scoring reaches higher average accuracy for features than neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5725ba14deff-351774e531cd-img-041.png" width="180"> | feature activation이 클수록 interval-level 해석이 전체 feature 가설과 더 잘 맞는다는 activation interval 분석 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: higher-activation feature intervals are more consistent with human interpretations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/badf51b8001b-f2c27a0c3744-img-042.png" width="180"> | logit inspection, feature ablation, pinned sampling으로 feature의 downstream effect를 교차검증하는 방법 요약 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: downstream feature effects are checked with logit weights, feature ablation, and pinned feature sampling. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9920b53c99e9-a86d2183dc00-img-043.png" width="180"> | A/0, A/1, A/2 feature direction을 2-D UMAP으로 놓아 base64, Arabic 등 cluster가 생김을 보여주는 지도. | Towards Monosemanticity: a 2-D UMAP of feature directions reveals clusters from multiple dictionary sizes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/037f5cd8e754-5171c899c185-img-044.png" width="180"> | UMAP feature cluster에 base64, Arabic script 같은 의미 라벨을 붙여 qualitative cluster와 geometry가 일치함을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity: UMAP clusters correspond to qualitative groups such as base64 and Arabic script features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b57a8489e380-fedd31d9524b-img-045.png" width="180"> | coarse한 technical-writing feature가 dictionary size가 커질수록 수학, 물리, ML 등 더 세밀한 feature로 split되는 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: mathematics and physics features split and refine across runs with more learned sparse features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/3eb3332085a5-d31b9a32f0f8-img-046.png" width="180"> | 단일 token P처럼 보이던 coarse feature가 실제로는 서로 다른 문맥의 여러 P feature로 분해된다는 feature splitting 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: single-token-looking features can split into many context-specific features at higher dictionary sizes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/46825277aa80-630d95337abd-img-047.png" width="180"> | A/0의 하나짜리 base64 feature가 A/1에서 letters, digits, ASCII-encoded base64 등 세 feature로 나뉘는 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: one coarse base64 feature in A/0 splits into three base64-related features in A/1. | yes |
| <img src="assets/11aa1e172dc1-4cf9c5bbd206-img-048.png" width="180"> | base64 letters feature와 digits feature의 logit weights가 대부분 비슷하지만 digit 예측에서 차이 나는 점을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity: base64 split features predict similar tokens, except the digit feature downweights digit continuations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f7bebb6a92ae-028b15f2cc11-img-049.png" width="180"> | 세 번째 base64 feature가 ASCII text를 encode한 base64 substring에 반응한다는 발견을 예시로 보여주는 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: A/1/1544 fires on base64 strings that encode ASCII text. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5d5bc06a6e9a-70fae0bc6ca7-img-050.png" width="180"> | activation similarity와 logit weight similarity라는 두 feature 유사도 개념을 Arabic feature scatter로 설명하는 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: Arabic feature scatter plots illustrate activation similarity and logit-weight similarity between runs. | yes |
| <img src="assets/52e623b43ee2-e7c17ce381be-img-051.png" width="180"> | A/1 feature마다 B/1에서 가장 비슷한 feature를 찾으면 neuron보다 높은 activation correlation을 보인다는 분포 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: many A/1 features have highly activation-correlated counterparts in B/1, more than neurons do. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f2d92295411b-e5dfe51e2cd4-img-052.png" width="180"> | activation similarity가 높아도 logit weight similarity는 낮을 수 있음을 전체 feature scatter로 보여주는 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: activation similarity and logit-weight similarity can disagree across matched features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a7a0bf53799a-40e4c16d4f59-img-053.png" width="180"> | activation과 logit effect를 합친 attribution similarity가 activation similarity와 잘 맞는다는 universality 검증 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity: attribution similarity combines activation and logit effects and correlates with activation similarity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0499446895f9-9e9f4481f2a0-img-054.png" width="180"> | base64 feature가 다음 base64 token을 올려 자기 자신을 다시 활성화시키는 single-node finite-state-like loop 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: a base64 feature can self-excite by predicting tokens that continue to activate it. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b207a277bbcb-463b7a3738e1-img-055.png" width="180"> | ALL_CAPS_SNAKE_CASE 변수를 생성하는 all-caps feature와 underscore feature의 two-node system 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: an all-caps text feature and underscore feature form a two-node system for snake-case variables. | yes |
| <img src="assets/506f94766d6a-d084ea4b4b4e-img-056.png" width="180"> | Chinese Unicode character가 complete character, prefix, suffix feature 사이를 오가며 예측되는 state-machine 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: Chinese split-token handling can be modeled with features for complete characters, prefixes, and suffixes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/68128a30f5e8-d359d5c836c4-img-057.png" width="180"> | HTML open tag, tag name, tag close, whitespace feature가 순환하며 HTML-like text를 만드는 four-node system 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: a four-node HTML feature system predicts a path like open tag, tag name, close, whitespace, and new tag. | yes |
| <img src="assets/10d5b135e080-bc50695a884a-img-058.png" width="180"> | IRC transcript 문맥에서 닉네임, 메시지, 이모티콘류 feature들이 다른 finite-state-like system을 이루는 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: IRC-transcript features form a separate finite-state-like system. | yes |
| <img src="assets/560eba0af10d-2e2800fd35e8-img-059.png" width="180"> | 오픈소스 라이선스 문구의 특정 phrase를 feature sequence가 사실상 암기하는 mechanistic memorization 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity: a sequence of features appears to memorize part of the phrase MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. | yes |
| <img src="assets/603d48565984-b54ae18ab3c3-img-060.png" width="180"> | 관련 feature들이 균일하게 흩어지기보다 cluster나 feature manifold처럼 뭉칠 수 있다는 수정된 superposition 그림. | Towards Monosemanticity: related features may clump into higher-density groups or feature manifolds, beyond isotropic one-dimensional feature superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/dfca2fb683dc-dd3452af1f71-img-061.png" width="180"> | 상관된 feature들의 convex hull을 feature manifold로 볼 수 있고, finite feature 집합으로 설명되지 않는 manifold도 가능함을 보여주는 도식. | Towards Monosemanticity: correlated feature clusters may be understood as convex hulls or manifolds, and not every manifold has a unique finite-feature description. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2ca6062b4139-879479ad2367-img-062.png" width="180"> | Neel Nanda replication에서 sparse autoencoder decoder weight가 neuron basis에 고도로 분산되어 있음을 보여주는 분석 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity comments: Nanda finds decoder weights are mostly dense in the neuron basis, while kurtosis still shows a privileged neuron basis. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5452ca67553a-cbd0f07feef3-img-063.png" width="180"> | A/16 feature density histogram에서 ultralow density cluster와 high density cluster가 bimodal하게 갈라지는 모습. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: feature density histograms can be bimodal, with an ultralow-density cluster and a higher-density feature cluster. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9a41c4df7343-4c759983400f-img-064.png" width="180"> | large autoencoder와 큰 L1 coefficient 조건에서 ultralow/high density cluster가 density만으로는 겹칠 수 있음을 보여주는 예시. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: density clusters can overlap in large runs or high-L1 settings. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b938662fb1ec-88d3b929959c-img-065.png" width="180"> | density, bias, encoder-decoder dot product를 함께 보면 ultralow/high density feature cluster를 다시 분리할 수 있음을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: density, bias, and encoder-decoder dot product separate high-density and ultralow-density clusters. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6e0b9ca06382-5c58584c4a33-img-066.png" width="180"> | Seed A run 전체의 feature density histogram으로 autoencoder 크기와 L1에 따라 더 희귀한 feature가 계속 발견됨을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: across Seed A runs, increasing learned sparse features discovers more and rarer features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/bdc655a7a9cc-e0d195336dfa-img-067.png" width="180"> | L0 norm과 reconstructed transformer NLL 사이의 sparsity와 explained behavior tradeoff를 보여주는 hyperparameter 선택 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: L0 norm and reconstructed transformer NLL expose a tradeoff between sparsity and recovered model behavior. | yes |
| <img src="assets/bf805c3891ff-c5ff37ceb7b0-img-068.png" width="180"> | automated interpretability 평가에서 Spearman과 Pearson correlation 분포가 거의 같은 결론을 낸다는 비교 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: Pearson and Spearman automated-interpretability score distributions give similar conclusions. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2d3d6804be1a-82c2ed2570d6-img-069.png" width="180"> | randomized transformer feature가 single-token cluster와 polysemantic cluster로 bimodal하게 갈라져 자동 평가를 왜곡할 수 있음을 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: randomized transformer features are bimodal, with many trivial single-token features and a polysemantic cluster. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9f4c52754a39-ee9034e7a925-img-070.png" width="180"> | importance scoring을 적용하면 sparse feature score가 0 근처로 몰리는 automated interpretability 평가상의 caveat를 보여준다. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: importance scoring heavily weights random examples, pushing many sparse feature scores near zero. | yes |
| <img src="assets/dd667fd7efc4-4bcc7b2dc181-img-071.png" width="180"> | Claude explanation이 태그를 벗어나 길어지는 경우가 있지만 score 차이를 크게 만들지는 않는다는 explanation length caveat 그래프. | Towards Monosemanticity appendix: long explanations from formatting failures are tracked and do not significantly change automated-interpretability scores. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fa60211378cc-6b8e26763a6c-img-001.png" width="180"> | Transformer residual stream에서 layer가 깊어질수록 outlier dimension 수가 늘어나는 현상을 보여주는 그래프. | Privileged Bases: residual-stream scalar outliers are counted by layer using an absolute-value threshold. | yes |
| <img src="assets/438d282e48ca-273b5671b217-img-002.png" width="180"> | activation kurtosis가 3보다 훨씬 커서 residual stream이 임의 basis가 아니라 privileged basis에 가깝다는 증거를 보여준다. | Privileged Bases: kurtosis across layers is wildly non-Gaussian, indicating a non-arbitrary basis. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ceb6e615fc25-cbfcdc2ca873-img-003.png" width="180"> | random orthonormal rotation 후 같은 activation의 kurtosis가 거의 3으로 돌아가 metric이 basis alignment를 잡는다는 확인 그래프. | Privileged Bases: after a random rotation, the same residual stream values have kurtosis near 3. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a0e4b3f34685-b51bdab2bea1-img-004.png" width="180"> | LayerNorm의 basis dependency를 줄인 RMSNorm-like normalization에서도 heavy-tailed activation이 남아 있음을 보여준다. | Privileged Bases: removing LayerNorm basis dependence does not remove heavy-tailed activations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b77793082a16-d6ea72f44437-img-005.png" width="180"> | 모델의 read/write matrix에 random rotation과 transpose를 삽입해 forward pass가 basis-independent인지 검증하는 도식. | Privileged Bases: random rotations are applied to matrices reading from and writing to the residual stream to test rotation invariance. | yes |
| <img src="assets/74e8b1d928c7-684ed747cce5-img-006.png" width="180"> | random-basis training 모델들의 residual activation kurtosis가 거의 3이라 residual basis outlier가 사라졌음을 보여준다. | Privileged Bases: shared and independent rotation models have residual activations with kurtosis near 3. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2783d5d11cbe-fa0b086704f2-img-007.png" width="180"> | shared rotation 모델에서는 residual stream이 아니라 computation basis 안에서 heavy tail이 다시 나타난다는 증거 그래프. | Privileged Bases: post-rotation activations show heavy tails in the computation basis for the shared-rotation model. | yes |
| <img src="assets/811d196ba9c7-ae8cd3dceccc-img-008.png" width="180"> | baseline, shared rotation, independent rotation 모델의 training loss가 초반 차이 뒤 거의 같은 수준으로 수렴함을 보여준다. | Privileged Bases: training loss curves for the rotated models converge close to the baseline after early variation. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1f9937f742fa-bd5997737a61-img-001.png" width="180"> | 색-모양 조합마다 하나의 neuron을 두는 local code로, monosemantic하지만 neuron 수가 많이 드는 표현을 보여준다. | Distributed Representations: a local code uses one neuron for each color-shape pair and has no superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/931f29419160-cb4d1d5e440d-img-002.png" width="180"> | 색 feature와 모양 feature를 따로 두고 조합해 객체를 표현하는 compositional distributed representation 도식. | Distributed Representations: a compositional code represents colors and shapes as independent features that compose. | yes |
| <img src="assets/3f16cfeb8ce3-996cda21c443-img-003.png" width="180"> | 4개 neuron으로 여러 색-모양 조합을 encoding하는 dense/maximal superposition code 예시. | Distributed Representations: a dense code uses maximal superposition to represent many unrelated objects with few neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/39df06c59ab2-ef5852a383e5-img-004.png" width="180"> | composition과 superposition이 단일 “distributed” 스펙트럼이 아니라 서로 다른 두 전략임을 비교하는 개념 도식. | Distributed Representations: compositional and highly distributed codes use different strategies, composition and superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e45fd3e15ac0-fc514f39a7e4-img-005.png" width="180"> | 제한된 bit volume을 composition에 쓰면 조합을 표현하고, superposition에 쓰면 더 많은 비조합 feature를 저장한다는 tradeoff 그림. | Distributed Representations: composition and superposition allocate exponential representational volume in competing ways. | yes |
| <img src="assets/70ff5e9bf0a2-ceaacd7abb9b-img-006.png" width="180"> | composition space에 잘 쓰이지 않는 hole이 있으면 sparse feature를 superposition으로 넣을 수 있다는 직관 도식. | Distributed Representations: sparse or limited composition leaves low-probability holes that can store other features in superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/54540040cf8c-8fe30c0294a2-img-007.png" width="180"> | Thorpe의 semi-distributed code를 색끼리, 모양끼리 mutual superposition에 넣은 혼합 전략으로 해석한 그림. | Distributed Representations: Thorpe&#x27;s semi-distributed code mixes composition with mutual superposition among colors and shapes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/df949107b984-47a10fedce75-img-008.png" width="180"> | A+B=Green, D+E=Square처럼 neuron 선형결합 방향을 feature로 보아 compositional feature를 superposition 속에서 읽는 도식. | Distributed Representations: linear combinations of neurons can correspond to composable shape and color features in superposition. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9e866e06dd64-2afce5b5c1bb-img-001.png" width="180"> | 2차원 hidden space에서 sparse feature가 pentagon으로 배치되는 normal superposition 기준 예시. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent: normal superposition maps sparse features to regular polytopes such as a pentagon in 2D. | yes |
| <img src="assets/3c23412e9fb8-f20cc3278b75-img-002.png" width="180"> | finite dataset에서는 feature보다 training datapoint activation이 더 깨끗한 polytope 구조로 표현될 수 있음을 보여준다. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent: finite-data models can look messy by features but clean by training-example hidden vectors. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c0e83360a9cf-9b6a1c52435f-img-003.png" width="180"> | dataset size가 커지며 datapoint memorization regime에서 generalizing feature regime으로 넘어가는 geometry와 test loss bump를 보여준다. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent: varying dataset size reveals small-data memorization, large-data generalization, and an intermediate regime. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2ad3d740c988-f4455db18303-img-004.png" width="180"> | dataset size별 W norm과 bias norm이 memorization regime에서 커졌다가 generalizing regime에서 plateau로 가는 추세를 보여준다. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent: consistent scaling reveals W and b norms peak in the middle and plateau in the large-data regime. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9f2d645c08da-55aeabc21d0f-img-005.png" width="180"> | training examples T와 hidden dimensions m을 함께 바꾼 2D double descent surface로, 더 큰 모델/데이터가 오히려 손실을 키우는 영역을 보여준다. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent: double descent appears as a function of both dataset size T and hidden dimension m. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ff98ddd08e0a-5f31a3f4bf01-img-006.png" width="180"> | Adam Jermyn replication에서 원 논문과 유사하게 memorization, intermediate, generalization 세 regime이 재현됨을 보여준다. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: replication of the dataset-size figure shows the same three qualitative regimes. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2843b2a91aba-cb803a69c438-img-007.png" width="180"> | replication에서 W norm과 bias norm의 dataset-size trend도 질적으로 재현된다는 비교 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: replicated W and bias norm trends are qualitatively similar to the original figure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7d5b85c2d8e2-185ff6427c2e-img-008.png" width="180"> | weight decay를 바꿔도 generalizing scale이 크게 움직이지 않아 “weight decay가 scale을 정한다”는 가설에 반대되는 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: varying weight decay does not shift the generalizing scale, arguing against a weight-decay explanation. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9a5aa617d6fb-ff610efb9a17-img-009.png" width="180"> | T(1-S)로 축을 바꾸면 feature frequency가 다른 실험들이 비슷한 generalization scale에 정렬되는 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: generalization occurs when each feature appears roughly enough times, aligning on T(1-S). | yes |
| <img src="assets/3076f7da2ae9-451c7d4f2754-img-010.png" width="180"> | hidden dimension이 더 큰 모델에서는 generalization scale curve가 덜 깔끔하게 겹쳐져 추가 요인이 있음을 암시하는 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: higher-dimensional models show less cleanly aligned dimensionality curves. | yes |
| <img src="assets/838f2cf933f3-449b0bc5b24b-img-011.png" width="180"> | 추가 hidden dimension 조건에서 feature dimensionality trend가 복잡하게 변하는 두 번째 확장 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: additional dimensionality curves show remaining unexplained trends. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d7ea11fbf253-b0d4f57e69f6-img-012.png" width="180"> | 반복된 datapoint 하나가 일반 feature 하나를 대체해 embedding space에 같이 들어가는 training history와 최종 embedding 그림. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: a repeated datapoint can be embedded alongside generalizing features and suppress one feature. | yes |
| <img src="assets/bfac77e53212-2ebefa5ddd62-img-013.png" width="180"> | 반복 datapoint가 여러 개일 때 모델이 이를 우선적으로 학습하고 각각 generalizing feature를 대체하는 예시. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: multiple repeated datapoints are preferentially learned, each replacing a feature in embedding space. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fcd9d83a0936-def265f01864-img-014.png" width="180"> | 반복 datapoint가 5개를 넘으면 모델이 5개를 embed하고 원래 배웠을 5개 feature를 모두 억제하는 사례. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: with more than five repeated datapoints, five are embedded and all five generalizing features are suppressed. | yes |
| <img src="assets/659fb2d83806-45fa785c0f31-img-015.png" width="180"> | 반복 횟수 R과 T/N 비율이 datapoint memorization 여부를 가르는 threshold를 대략 설명한다는 산점도. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: repeated datapoints are memorized when repeat count scales roughly with T/N. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7369c5b58ac6-da8bbe06d387-img-016.png" width="180"> | memorization 경계에서 모델이 datapoint를 잠깐 외웠다가 다시 포기하는 near-miss 현상을 보여주는 training trajectory. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: near the memorization edge, models can briefly memorize a datapoint and then decide against it. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f21ef5c1e944-b8ccdfb5d2a4-img-017.png" width="180"> | MNIST 모델의 maximal data dimensionality에서 극단적으로 높은 outlier 예시가 weird/memorized datapoint 후보로 나타나는 그림. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: maximal data dimensionality on MNIST highlights weird outlier examples that may be memorized. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b9ae33098622-e6c06db5a9f8-img-018.png" width="180"> | 2D memorization regime에서 datapoint가 하나의 원이 아니라 서로 다른 반지름의 두 원으로 나뉘는 optimization failure 예시. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent comments: some m=2 memorization models arrange points on two circles of different radii. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e53abb88eccc-2f8f9fd178b4-img-019.png" width="180"> | weight decay를 낮추면 double descent test loss bump가 커지고, 크게 높이면 bump가 사라지는 appendix 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent appendix: decreasing weight decay increases the test-loss bump, while large weight decay removes it. | yes |
| <img src="assets/00bc7f8daa15-d4bdc7d5906a-img-020.png" width="180"> | training epoch 수가 많을수록 double descent test loss bump가 커지는 appendix 실험 그래프. | Superposition, Memorization, and Double Descent appendix: more training epochs lead to a larger bump in test loss. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5681b4e74ba2-da615c4027f6-img-001.png" width="180"> | SAE dictionary learning에서 compute가 feature 수와 training step 수의 곱으로 스케일되는 hyperparameter sweep 설정 그림. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: SAE compute primarily depends on number of learned features and number of training steps. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f75cbc032819-9f4906e25a4d-img-002.png" width="180"> | 주어진 FLOPS에서 loss가 가장 낮은 compute-optimal step 수와 feature 수를 추적하는 방법을 보여주는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: compute-optimal loss and parameters are tracked for a given FLOPS budget. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9c225abd2e88-85601a8cffe8-img-003.png" width="180"> | SAE loss가 compute-optimal feature/step 선택 아래 FLOPS에 대해 대략 power law로 감소함을 보여준다. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: loss decreases approximately as a power law in FLOPS under compute-optimal hyperparameters. | yes |
| <img src="assets/0516d82a95b0-b18d571466b2-img-004.png" width="180"> | FLOPS budget이 커질수록 최적 training step 수와 feature 수가 각각 power law로 증가하는 scaling graph. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: optimal training steps and number of features both scale roughly as power laws with FLOPS. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c0bfd5d59467-cde357ea953c-img-005.png" width="180"> | feature 수가 늘어날 때 compute-optimal training step 수가 sublinear하게 늘어나는 관계를 보여주는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: compute-optimal training steps scale with the number of features with an exponent between roughly 0.5 and 1. | yes |
| <img src="assets/200f17f05563-e8d38a531665-img-006.png" width="180"> | L1 sparsity penalty를 더 강조할수록 compute-optimal training step 수가 커진다는 실험 결과. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: stronger L1 sparsity penalty makes more training steps compute-optimal. | yes |
| <img src="assets/171cb4387a5b-e3b5036200ac-img-007.png" width="180"> | L0 기반 loss를 최적화하려면 L1 기반 loss보다 같은 feature 수에서 더 많은 training step이 필요하다는 비교 그래프. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: L0-based loss functions require more training steps than L1-based losses for a given number of features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/091e1b62c0d7-39724ca0bdfa-img-008.png" width="180"> | feature ablation이 random perturbation이나 activation dampening보다 모델 출력에 더 큰 영향을 준다는 SAE feature leverage 실험. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: feature ablations have outsized impact compared with random or magnitude-controlled perturbations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c9dbcdfd9015-38037078e482-img-009.png" width="180"> | Transformer circuit에서 길이 k 이하 경로의 중요도를 추적하는 path importance algorithm 기본 수식/도식. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: revisits an algorithm for studying paths of length at most k in transformer circuits. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a9ac9e3efe27-6caecb8c1595-img-010.png" width="180"> | path algorithm 첫 iteration에서 direct path와 length-1 path를 분리해 저장하는 과정을 시각화한 그림. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: the first iteration isolates length-0 paths while saving length-1 paths. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4590d1eab109-4f71ed13dbb5-img-011.png" width="180"> | 다음 iteration에서 length-1 path를 사용하고 length-2 path를 저장하는 식으로 경로 길이를 확장하는 도식. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: the next iteration uses length-1 paths and saves length-2 paths, continuing recursively. | yes |
| <img src="assets/28f9cc14fca2-bb81dba04ac0-img-012.png" width="180"> | base case를 바꿔 ablation의 k-step effect를 분리하는 path algorithm 변형을 보여주는 그림. | Circuits Updates - April 2024: modifying the base case can isolate k-step effects of an ablation. | yes |
| <img src="assets/1975a84a54d1-f3dfaa5ea35e-img-001.png" width="180"> | SAE feature quality 평가에서 random pair Sort eval이 evaluation loss와 함께 움직이는지 확인하는 검증 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: the Sort eval on randomly selected pairs is compared against evaluation loss to judge whether it tracks feature quality. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f433bc75d263-51e0a0a9f96f-img-002.png" width="180"> | 다른 sweep 조건에서 Sort eval과 evaluation loss의 상관을 재확인해 metric 신뢰도를 점검하는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: a second Sort eval plot checks whether the evaluation metric reliably follows loss changes across hyperparameter sweeps. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7c6ef98f8ace-34126a8421da-img-003.png" width="180"> | nonzero activation을 동일 가중으로 둔 contrastive eval이 evaluation loss와 대체로 일관된 패턴을 보이는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: the weighted contrastive eval is plotted against evaluation loss as another feature-quality metric. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8174ab19e724-4aea2aafd427-img-004.png" width="180"> | SAE variant별 MSE와 log L0 tradeoff를 비교해 sparsity 관점에서 어떤 변형이 나은지 보여주는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: SAE variants are compared on the MSE versus log L0 tradeoff, where lower L0 is better. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ba6831a53363-1eedc4587834-img-005.png" width="180"> | SAE variant들의 MSE 대비 Sort Eval 성능을 비교해 vanilla SAE보다 나은 변형을 평가하는 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: SAE variants are compared on Sort Eval, with higher scores indicating better feature quality. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b8bef31acdbc-8bddf4997237-img-006.png" width="180"> | SAE variant별 weighted contrastive eval과 MSE tradeoff를 비교하는 성능 평가 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: weighted contrastive eval compares non-vanilla SAE variants against vanilla SAEs. | yes |
| <img src="assets/dc390edb361a-1d8d05e91375-img-007.png" width="180"> | contrastive eval 기준으로 non-vanilla SAE 변형들이 vanilla보다 나은지 확인하는 보조 비교 그래프. | Circuits Updates - August 2024: a second contrastive-eval plot supports the conclusion that SAE variants outperform vanilla SAEs. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9b2bdab9e30c-6462edcb2a1b-img-001.png" width="180"> | feature가 단일 neuron이 아니라 여러 neuron의 선형결합으로 표현될 수 있다는 superposition 기본 도식. | Sparse Crosscoders: superposition implies features are often represented by linear combinations of multiple neurons. | yes |
| <img src="assets/9ad1d382803f-e9052ceaa9e5-img-002.png" width="180"> | residual stream의 선형성 때문에 transformer 두 layer를 거의 parallel branch처럼 다시 그릴 수 있음을 보여주는 도식. | Sparse Crosscoders: transformer layers can be redrawn as almost parallel branches because the residual stream is linear. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c8c8753358ca-53d050e038e5-img-003.png" width="180"> | 하나의 feature를 계산하는 one-step circuit이 여러 layer에 나뉘어 거의 병렬로 구현될 수 있다는 cross-layer superposition 예시. | Sparse Crosscoders: a one-step feature circuit can be split across two layers while functioning in parallel. | yes |
| <img src="assets/648a6179792c-3fe2d4d18047-img-004.png" width="180"> | 여러 layer에 공동 표현된 feature를 함께 dictionary learning하는 crosscoder 설정을 설명하는 개요도. | Sparse Crosscoders: when features are jointly represented across layers, dictionary learning can be applied to those layers jointly as a crosscoder. | yes |
| <img src="assets/36bf8aae2f66-178c2c7469e6-img-005.png" width="180"> | 하나의 feature가 residual stream 안에서 여러 layer에 걸쳐 생기고 유지되고 사라지는 lifecycle 도식. | Sparse Crosscoders: persistent residual-stream features can appear, persist across layers, and decay over a feature lifecycle. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a87d3edee913-b2343a4ab7ac-img-006.png" width="180"> | per-layer SAE로는 지속 feature가 중복되어 복잡한 causal graph가 되지만 crosscoder로는 단순화됨을 비교하는 그림. | Sparse Crosscoders: per-layer SAEs duplicate persistent features, while an ideal crosscoder collapses them into a simpler feature graph. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d89075dfb4c4-2079d02a992d-img-007.png" width="180"> | autoencoder와 transcoder를 crosscoder family의 특수한 경우로 보고 multi-layer read/write 일반화를 설명하는 도식. | Sparse Crosscoders: autoencoders and transcoders are special cases of crosscoders that read and write to one or more layers. | yes |
| <img src="assets/359c14211063-f9181c98db35-img-008.png" width="180"> | acausal, weakly causal, strictly causal crosscoder 변형들의 read/write 제약을 표로 비교한 요약 그림. | Sparse Crosscoders: the table summarizes crosscoder variants and their causal masking constraints. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f5b8219d1d34-7ebe44e6af9a-img-009.png" width="180"> | global crosscoder가 같은 총 feature 수에서 per-layer SAE보다 eval loss를 낮추지만 FLOPS 효율은 다를 수 있음을 보여준다. | Sparse Crosscoders: crosscoders outperform per-layer SAEs on eval loss for a fixed total number of features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/868026572a4c-54031757bbfb-img-010.png" width="180"> | 전체 모델 activity의 MSE-L0 tradeoff에서 crosscoder가 per-layer SAE보다 훨씬 덜 중복된 decomposition을 만든다는 그래프. | Sparse Crosscoders: crosscoders provide a better whole-model MSE versus L0 tradeoff by consolidating shared cross-layer structure. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d4d9d7b28c88-e143db70b6ea-img-011.png" width="180"> | 50개 crosscoder feature의 layer별 decoder norm이 특정 layer에서 peak를 갖고 앞뒤로 감쇠하는 경향을 보여준다. | Sparse Crosscoders: decoder norms for sampled crosscoder features tend to peak in one layer and decay across earlier and later layers. | yes |
| <img src="assets/4b3f5d0b4bda-6c6f8bec1915-img-012.png" width="180"> | crosscoder feature의 layer별 decoder norm과 direction cosine/projection을 통해 feature drift 유형을 비교하는 예시. | Sparse Crosscoders: example features show decoder direction drift, stability, or persistence across layers. | yes |
| <img src="assets/70b1c154f062-0d34a8fcc3f3-img-013.png" width="180"> | 36개 random crosscoder feature에 대해 layer별 norm과 direction drift를 한눈에 보여주는 대표 표본 그림. | Sparse Crosscoders: 36 randomly selected features show a representative range of cross-layer norm and direction behavior. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f0b8a1348bf9-ced0545f35b4-img-014.png" width="180"> | strictly causal cross-layer transcoder에서 local feature와 global feature, 중간형 feature의 decoder norm 패턴을 보여준다. | Sparse Crosscoders: strictly causal cross-layer transcoders find local, global, and intermediate features across downstream MLP outputs. | yes |
| <img src="assets/6e6568b0ffe5-8ada649f7143-img-015.png" width="180"> | pre/post MLP crosscoder가 pre-only, shared, post-only feature를 trimodal relative norm 구조로 분리함을 보여준다. | Sparse Crosscoders: pre/post MLP crosscoders separate pre-only, shared, and post-only features by relative decoder norms. | yes |
