| <img src="assets/9abd2f465e10-e5faea1c00e2-img-016.png" width="180"> | stable feature의 pre/post MLP direction alignment가 양의 상관은 있지만 분산이 크고 낮은 절대값임을 보여주는 그래프. | Sparse Crosscoders: stable features show positive but noisy alignment between pre- and post-MLP decoder directions. | yes |
| <img src="assets/846be0fc92a2-e95430e05b76-img-017.png" width="180"> | base model과 finetuned model crosscoder에서 base-specific, finetuned-specific, shared feature가 세 군집으로 나뉘는 model diff 그림. | Sparse Crosscoders: model-diffing crosscoders separate base-model-specific, finetuned-model-specific, and shared features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/011346d689da-524643b93c4b-img-018.png" width="180"> | shared feature의 decoder vector가 base와 finetuned model에서 대체로 정렬되어 같은 concept/function을 나타냄을 보여주는 비교. | Sparse Crosscoders: shared features usually have aligned decoder vectors between base and finetuned models. | yes |
| <img src="assets/588956883fd4-2aca5eee1a11-img-019.png" width="180"> | 여러 모델 scale과 layer에 걸친 crosscoder feature loading을 NMF로 나눠 어떤 layer/model 쌍이 feature를 공유하는지 보여준다. | Sparse Crosscoders: NMF over decoder norms across layer and model scale reveals shared representational components. | yes |
| <img src="assets/72839bb40048-d092dda85581-img-001.png" width="180"> | 18-layer model에서 feature activation classifier와 raw activation classifier를 last-token/max-pooling 방식별로 비교한 ROC AUC 그래프. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: feature and raw-activation classifiers are compared on synthetic and human bioweapon datasets with last-token and max-pooling agg | yes |
| <img src="assets/f13839478183-2ec58d45c560-img-002.png" width="180"> | Sonnet 3.0의 1M-feature SAE에서도 max-pooling feature classifier가 synthetic dataset에서 강하고 human dataset은 raw activation이 앞서는 결과. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: a larger Sonnet 3.0 SAE shows feature max-pooling works well on synthetic data while raw activations can do better on human data. | yes |
| <img src="assets/7fe94b0ba88f-23bc2d346a8d-img-003.png" width="180"> | academic publication formatting feature가 synthetic dataset에서 harmless와 spurious correlation을 갖는 빈도 분석 그래프. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: a feature for academic-publication formatting fires often in synthetic datasets and is spuriously associated with harmless exampl | yes |
| <img src="assets/c9a48bc9b7c6-d83ac0f67106-img-004.png" width="180"> | feature가 찾아낸 publication-style suffix를 harmful prompt에 붙이면 classifier harmful probability가 크게 낮아지는 adversarial attack 결과. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: adversarial suffixes from a spurious feature shift feature-based classifier probabilities toward harmless. | yes |
| <img src="assets/169e0489caba-c9396c0879fd-img-005.png" width="180"> | 같은 spurious suffix attack이 raw-activation classifier에도 harmful probability shift를 만든다는 비교 histogram. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: the same adversarial suffixes also strongly affect raw-activation classifier probabilities. | yes |
| <img src="assets/bf76c1707975-18e105d3516c-img-006.png" width="180"> | raw activation 상위 예시에서 만든 thank-you suffix attack은 feature-based classifier에 훨씬 덜 효과적임을 보여준다. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: a raw-activation-derived thank-you suffix attack is much less effective against the feature-based classifier. | yes |
| <img src="assets/ce11953d47e5-bc7709037486-img-007.png" width="180"> | thank-you suffix attack이 raw-activation classifier에도 약하게만 작동해 feature 기반으로 찾은 attack보다 나쁨을 보여준다. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: the raw-activation-derived suffix attack is also much less effective against the raw-activation classifier. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e7ade1dd93b4-2e95b1ff7c0f-img-008.png" width="180"> | OOD synthetic_3에서 feature-based classifier가 raw activation보다 높은 ROC AUC를 내며 다양한 언어/encoding에 더 잘 일반화함을 보여준다. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: feature classifiers can outperform raw-activation classifiers on highly out-of-distribution multilingual and encoded datasets. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d96285463c85-4c0eda18f938-img-009.png" width="180"> | decision tree classifier에서 feature activation 기반 tree가 raw activation tree보다 낫지만 logistic regression보다는 낮은 성능을 보이는 그래프. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: decision trees on features are interpretable and outperform raw-activation trees, though they underperform logistic regression. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5e4953f8d764-4e0acb3d7f7f-img-010.png" width="180"> | 전염성 병원체, aerosolization, viability feature로 harmful bio prompt를 분류하는 해석 가능한 depth-2 decision tree 예시. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: a shallow feature decision tree uses pathogen, aerosolization, and viability features to classify harmful prompts. | yes |
| <img src="assets/b696e5d34fbf-fd89f21f6b4f-img-011.png" width="180"> | feature activation에 SAE residual classifier를 보태면 features-only와 raw-activation 사이 성능 격차를 줄일 수 있음을 보여준다. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: adding the SAE residual to feature activations can close performance gaps with raw activations. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8aa91437ea70-c1be358057de-img-012.png" width="180"> | Human/Assistant tag 일관성과 bio data oversampling이 feature classifier 성능을 크게 높인다는 ablation 그래프. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: consistent Human/Assistant tags and oversampling domain-relevant biology data improve feature classifier performance. | yes |
| <img src="assets/85171bc19c4a-7b334055dc6f-img-013.png" width="180"> | context 전체 max-pooling feature activation이 synthetic dataset에서 last-token 방식보다 classifier 성능을 높인다는 비교. | Using Dictionary Learning Features as Classifiers: max-pooling feature activations across the context enables feature classifiers to outperform raw activations on synthetic dataset | yes |
| <img src="assets/b6a421e92778-2b42e6e3b0c5-img-001.png" width="180"> | 5개 true attentional feature를 2개 attention head로 압축해 attention superposition을 연구하는 toy model 설정 도식. | Circuits Updates - January 2024: the attention-superposition toy model compresses sparse true attentional features into fewer attention heads. | yes |
| <img src="assets/fbe8f786b668-d3ca3feebfae-img-002.png" width="180"> | 5개 attentional feature가 2개 head mixing matrix 안에서 polygon-like geometry로 배열되는 결과 그림. | Circuits Updates - January 2024: the learned mixing matrix for five attentional features and two heads shows striking superposition geometry. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f2645411edba-c00f03ddde26-img-003.png" width="180"> | attention superposition toy model의 다른 시각화로 true attentional feature들의 mixing geometry를 확인하는 그림. | Circuits Updates - January 2024: a second plot visualizes the geometry of true attentional features represented by two learned heads. | yes |
| <img src="assets/8af1d005cdb1-f127095e549d-img-004.png" width="180"> | Ghost Grads가 neuron resampling보다 dead neuron을 줄이면서 비슷하거나 더 좋은 성능을 내는 SAE training 개선 그래프. | Circuits Updates - January 2024: Ghost Grads produces autoencoders with few dead neurons and competitive performance versus neuron resampling. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e9ad78d094a0-9518c3489b34-img-001.png" width="180"> | features, circuits, macroscopic picture로 이어지는 mechanistic interpretability 경로와 남은 hurdle들을 요약한 도식. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: the proposed path is to find interpretable features, understand their circuits, and zoom out to a macroscopic picture. | yes |
| <img src="assets/5ea5a208903e-8f5b15345a71-img-002.png" width="180"> | multidimensional feature에서 intensity as scaling이 manifold의 각 점을 ray로 확장하게 만든다는 선형 표현 도식. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: intensity as scaling constrains multidimensional feature manifolds into rays from each point. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c3786b7ab4d7-1c0dfc12426b-img-003.png" width="180"> | feature manifold의 가까운 점들이 너무 평행해질 수 있어 모델이 더 복잡한 embedding geometry를 원할 수 있음을 보여준다. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: nearby manifold points are nearly parallel, so models may need richer embeddings to distinguish them. | yes |
| <img src="assets/49535398fbae-f4d232f3a3e7-img-004.png" width="180"> | multidimensional feature의 각 ray가 고정된 semantic meaning을 가진 1D feature처럼 볼 수 있음을 설명하는 그림. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: rays in a linear multidimensional feature can be viewed as one-dimensional features locked to semantic points. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c8a20996fb9f-0ecd7104cc07-img-005.png" width="180"> | 1-layer transformer의 QK/OV pivot table로 skip-trigram 구현을 해석하는 예시 표. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: pivot tables summarize QK and OV circuits in one-layer attention-only transformers for skip-trigram interpretation. | yes |
| <img src="assets/f06827bb1294-510aeeb0e5ee-img-006.png" width="180"> | Brain Sciences feature가 활성화된 snippet에서 Claude 버전별 concept relevance rating이 얼마나 일치하는지 검증한 그래프. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: Claude relevance ratings for snippets where a feature activates are compared across model versions. | yes |
| <img src="assets/59a484a7d549-7620697f7d79-img-007.png" width="180"> | Claude 3.5 Sonnet으로 필터링한 concept snippet에서 highlighted feature가 실제로 얼마나 자주 활성화되는지 분석하는 설정 그림. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: filtered snippets are used to test whether highlighted Scaling Monosemanticity features detect their concepts. | yes |
| <img src="assets/d66a73cc2769-645128c2c984-img-008.png" width="180"> | 각 concept별로 highlighted feature가 sensitivity 상위권이지만 가장 sensitive feature는 아님을 보여주는 ranked count 그래프. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: highlighted features are in the top sensitivity ranks but are far from the most sensitive features. | yes |
| <img src="assets/a9881f4a601d-c6d02b0594a3-img-009.png" width="180"> | Brain sciences/transit/tourist concepts에서 가장 sensitive한 feature들의 sensitivity와 specificity를 비교한 예시. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: the most sensitive features for each concept are inspected for sensitivity and specificity. | yes |
| <img src="assets/76874c8c77a2-9c900bdabe61-img-010.png" width="180"> | 강하게 반응하는 대체 feature들이 원래 concept과 관련은 있지만 specificity가 줄어들 수 있음을 보여주는 보조 분석. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: alternative highly sensitive features can relate to the concept but be less specific than the highlighted feature. | yes |
| <img src="assets/56eee97388a9-74eb707a43c4-img-011.png" width="180"> | highlighted feature가 놓친 token 주변에서 concept 표현에 기여하는 complementary feature를 찾은 예시. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: manually inspecting missed tokens reveals complementary features that may represent the same concept. | yes |
| <img src="assets/c5117f9f1494-52e83271e668-img-012.png" width="180"> | 상위 50개 concept-responsive feature들이 high-relevance snippet을 어떻게 coverage하는지 보여주는 binary activation matrix. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: top responsive features show coverage over high-relevance snippets with black active entries. | yes |
| <img src="assets/e9e780161b97-968010f0b883-img-013.png" width="180"> | 다른 concept에서 상위 responsive feature들의 snippet coverage가 vertical banding pattern을 보이는 matrix. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: another concept&#x27;s top responsive features show banded coverage over relevant snippets. | yes |
| <img src="assets/2aa9d85c4c27-bcaaec2ad001-img-014.png" width="180"> | popular tourist attractions concept에서 더 다양한 feature coverage를 보여주는 high-relevance snippet activation matrix. | Circuits Updates - July 2024: popular tourist attraction snippets are covered by a diverse set of responsive features. | yes |

| <img src="assets/dc7a5b68e7c5-23f7bf902d5b-proxy-decision-dark.svg.svg" width="180"> | Flow diagram across two zones. Inside Anthropic&#x27;s infrastructure, a session sandbox that holds no credentials sends every outbound request to Agent Proxy, which matches it against admin rules. Three outcomes branch toward your systems: on a rule match, the credential is attached at the boundary and the request proceeds; on an allowlist-only match, the request is sent without credentials; on no match, the request is blocked entirely — the default-deny outcome — and the host is unreachable.를 보여주는 이미지. | security-and-data: * **Matches nothing.** The request is blocked outright; the host is unreachable rather than merely unauthenticated. ![Flow diagram across two zones. Inside Anthr | no |

A task mentioned in your Slack workspace runs in a session sandbox on Anthropic&#x27;s infrastructure, one sandbox per thread, holding no credentials. Outbound requests pass to Agent Proxy, which injects the credential drawn from the credential store; a request matching no rule is blocked. Credentialed requests reach your systems, like GitHub, a data warehouse, monitoring, or any HTTP API. A dashed return path shows results posting back in the thread, as Claude.를 보여주는 이미지. | agent-identity: The diagram below traces one request through this process. ![Diagram showing the request path across three zones. The outermost box is the Default Slack access scope: a bundle attached here is the baseline every channel gets. Inside it, two examples. Outside the workspace box, a channel called another-team in a different workspace gets only the default bundle. Inside the workspace box, which adds an optional bundle for channels inside it, two channel boxes: a public channel called general, with no channel bundle, gets the default plus the workspace bundle; a private channel, marked with a lock, with its own channel bundle, gets all three, the default, workspace, and channel bundles.를 보여주는 이미지. | attach-to-scope: Bundles stack downward. Step 1, tag Claude in with an @Claude message carrying a task. Steps 2 and 3 happen inside the sandbox. Step 2, a sandbox builds, one per thread; step 3, the working loop runs through the task&#x27;s steps using the channel&#x27;s access. Step 4, Claude posts the result in the thread as an answer, a doc, a chart, or a pull request. Step 5, a dashed quiet period follows, where the sandbox is released while the thread persists.
